title: A (Slightly) Mechanistic Theory for Exponentially Increasing AI Time Horizons?
summary: A (Slightly) Mechanistic Theory for Exponentially Increasing AI Time Horizons?
whyItMatters: AI ‘time horizons’ are mostly not about time (I think it’s mostly ‘data’, but you’ll see where I’m unsure). One chart from 2025 has become perhaps the most (in)famous in modern AI commentary. For those in the know, ‘ the METR graph ’ [1]  is unusually compelling because it achieves what so few measures of AI progress have achieved: a somewhat  mea…
